desc: A son copes with his father's death and reflects on their bond as it shapes his growth, love, hardship, and daring journeys through adolescence and adulthood alike.

title: Serial -En Thangai
desc: A heartfelt family drama following siblings as they face love, sacrifice, misunderstandings, and emotional bonds that test their loyalty to each other.

title: Serial -Penn
desc: A man resists California trends popular with his wife, friends, and Marin County neighbors, trying to stay true to his beliefs despite social pressure everywhere.

title: Vaarayo Vennilavey
desc: A woman comes for money, and she gets money. Yet love wins, guiding her heart and choices, proving money's power fades beside genuine love alone.

title: Saathanai Pengal
desc: Director Sivaji seeks a real Anarkali; Nalini's daughter Bhuvani becomes the new Anarkali, while Prabhu falls in love, but both die from poison.

title: Nalaya Theerppu
desc: A young man rises against injustice and political manipulation, determined to fight corruption and reclaim dignity while confronting powerful enemies.

title: Sakthi Leelai
desc: Goddess Parvati becomes Virat Shakti to defeat a demon created by Bhrigu Muni, and shows other fierce forms that punish evil and bless the faithful everywhere.

title: Naalum Nalamum
desc: Photographer Karthik, along with friends Arun and Viki, meets Oviya after her breakup. He falls in love with her, and their life becomes a romantic journey.

title: Ninaithaley Inikkum
desc: Kamal Hassan, a touring singer, falls for Jayaprada in Singapore, while Rajnikanth chases a fan message. Jayaprada reveals cancer, longs to perform, and dies tragically.
